mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookmark (user_num, movie_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userNum}, #{movieId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bookmark WHERE user_num = #{userNum} AND movie_id = #{movieId}
mapper.select: SELECT m.id AS id, m.title AS title, m.poster_path AS posterPath, m.release_date AS releaseDate, m.vote_average AS voteAverage FROM bookmark b INNER JOIN movies m ON b.movie_id = m.id WHERE b.user_num = #{userNum} ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
